questions.question_text: Which of the following statements about resistors connected in parallel is correct ? The total resistance is

options.B: less than any one of them.
options.D: greater than any one of them.

questions.explanation:
Resistance in parallel Formula 

 1 
 R total 

 = 
 1 
 R 1 

 + 
 1 
 R 2 

 + 
 1 
 R 3 

 + ... 
 1 
 R n 

When R total is calculated, the result is less than any one of the resistors.

questions.explanation:
Example of a trioxocarbonate (IV) salt is calcium carbonate.

The reaction with hydrochloric acid is shown below:

CaCO 3 + 2HCl → CaCl 2 + CO 2 + H 2 O

 Note : CO 2 is carbon (IV) oxide.
